rationale.R1.3: The output does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is not marked for all recommendations, only some.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors and fabrications in the form of incorrect conclusions about the results.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
